jp.title: 為替介入、原油高主導の円安問題視 連休前の薄商い狙った政府・日銀
jp.description: 政府・日銀は円買い介入に踏み切った。原油価格の高騰をきっかけにした一方的な円安を食い止めるのが狙いだ。中東情勢は緊迫が続き、日米金利差など経済環境に変化はない。介入で円安トレンドが変わるとの見方は乏しい。あらためて円売りの動きをけん制「大型連休はまだまだ序盤だ」1年9カ月ぶりの円買い介入から一晩明けた1日朝、財務省に登庁した三村淳財務官は集まった記者団にこう告げた。介入の有無には言及しなか

jp.title: 【BUZZ e-sports】スマブラ国内最大級大会「篝火」出場！“最強で憧れられるチーム”を目指して。現チーム体制を紹介

jp.title: 元モー娘。新垣里沙、第1子妊娠を発表 すでに安定期に「温かく見守っていただけたらうれしいです」 22年に再婚
jp.description: ニュース｜　元モーニング娘。でタレントの新垣里沙（37）が5月1日、第1子妊娠を発表した。自身のYouTubeチャンネルで明らかにした。　新垣は夫のヤスタケこと、山口安威（47）と動画に出演すると、「この度、新しい命を授かりました」と報告。「応援してくださってる皆様に、こうしてできてることがうれしい」と笑顔を見せ、「私の中で、ママになるっていうのは人生の中での夢の一つでもあった」と語った。

world.title: Affidavit reveals new details in deadly Berea bank shooting
world.description: WKYT has obtained an affidavit by a special agent with the Federal Bureau Investigation in the case of a deadly Berea bank shooting.

world.title: ED2030: Zanu PF ambushes villagers for signatures
world.description: CAB3 has sparked widespread debate, with critics warning that it can further concentrate power in the Executive and undermine democratic principles.

world.title: When can landlords increase rent? Can I get a cat? Your questions answered on renters' rights changes
world.description: Most of today's changes apply in England only, including new rules on pets, ending no-fault evictions and fixed-term tenancy contracts, and banning "bidding wars".

world.description: Simone Ashley talks about her Devil Wears Prada 2 role, working with Meryl Streep, her future in Bridgerton and her experience with F1 The Movie.

world.title: An Out of Control SpaceX Rocket Is Going to Smash Into Moon, Astronomer Says
world.description: The discarded upper stage of a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will smash into the Moon this summer, according to a new report.

world.title: Wike's PDP Faction Denies Leadership Crisis After S'Court Ru
world.description: The Wike-backed PDP slams claims of a leadership vacuum following a Supreme Court judgment, insisting its National Chairman remains in charge.

world.title: Octopus Energy boss: some people would accept occasional blackouts if bills cut
world.description: Greg Jackson argues against costly investments in UK’s power grid that are adding to household bills

world.title: Nvidia, Microsoft, Amazon Expand Classified Military AI Use
world.description: The Pentagon has struck agreements with more technology companies for expanded use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

world.title: Virgin Galactic reveals new ship, but it's running out of time and cash
world.description: It's not clear whether Virgin Galactic has the cash reserves to fund a prolonged test phase.
